title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.405 - Auditor's transition period defined
text:
29.405.  Auditor's transition period defined. — The transition period shall begin on the fifteenth day of November following the election of an auditor who is not an incumbent and shall end when that auditor-elect has taken the oath of office.
(L. 1977 H.B. 493 & 458)
